item.title: 继续照常使用 .env 文件。 | Continue Using .env Files As Usual.
item.description:
我们都知道，第一印象很重要。 文章的第一句话也是如此。 事实上，它可能对一篇文章更为关键，因为第一句话将决定某人是否继续阅读。

但是，就本文而言，说使用大型系统将使您有足够的资格撰写有关该主题的文章，这很有趣。 这句话有一种心理效应，让读者觉得自己很愚蠢，注定要失败，假设他们都在从事“Hello World”之类的项目。

不用说，作为读者，您可能会开始怀疑：“他说他从事大型系统工作是什么意思？” 我的意思是，从字面上看，现在每个人都在这样做。 我不认为它可以用作独特的卖点或任何东西； 几乎每个人都有使用大型企业系统的经验。

即使是最初级的工程师也可能在一个每天处理数百万个请求/记录的系统上工作。 那么，是什么让大型系统的工作如此独特？ 是什么让你觉得你的经历值得特别的？ 你需要证明你有一些独特的东西可以提供； 否则，这只是您文章中的另一个多余句子。 但无论如何，让我们继续前进。

让我们从批评.env文件看起来有问题的每一点开始，而实际上，它们根本不是问题，而是误解。

本节开始于：

问题很好......这是一个文件。

好吧，我不了解您以及您当前使用的是哪个操作系统，但Linux 中的所有内容实际上都是一个文件。 这包括设备、进程、套接字、文件、管道等。但是，关键问题是：它有什么问题？

如果您认为将 Linux 中的所有内容（包括 env vars）都制作为文件不是一个好主意，那么您必须邀请 Linus 进行辩论并讨论这种方法的缺点。 请提供您的解决方案。

此外，容器基于 Linux cgroup、命名空间和其他组件，这意味着它们也是围绕一切都是文件的概念构建的。 这使得 Linux 成为运行容器的非常强大的操作系统，因为一切都可以通过文件轻松管理和控制。

而且，k8s中的一切也是一个文件，一个YAML文件。 这个概念使 k8s 非常灵活和可定制。 您可以从字面上配置任何您想要的东西，并且几乎没有限制。

由于作者现在在谷歌工作，他有机会与k8s背后的大脑进行讨论，与他们争论文件的弊端，并与我们分享他的见解。 我们很想听听他对此事的看法！

此外，问题是：谁将.env文件提交到公共存储库？ 从字面上看，据我所知，没有一个拥有至少两个脑细胞的人愿意提交一个 env 文件。 有一个.gitignore文件，以防您想忽略该文件的提交； 这是基础，每个人都应该意识到这一点。

即使您不喜欢为每个新 repo 包含一个.gitignore文件，您也可以在全局~/.gitignore文件中添加一个新条目，因此您不必担心每次创建一个新的回购。

现在，您可能想知道：那么，如何与其他开发人员共享.env文件？ 答案是这样的：如果你在一个项目上与其他人合作，那么将你的.env文件保密是很重要的，这样只有受邀的合作者才能看到它（例如，为.env文件创建一个私人仓库）。

在公司工作的这些年里，我从来没有更新过数据库密码。 这是因为总是有人负责管理数据库，即 DBA。 访问更新密码将是一项巨大的责任，并可能导致安全漏洞。

因此，有人负责可确保密码保持最新且安全。 这也意味着，如果密码出现问题，只需要联系一个人来修复它。 该系统可能并不完美，但它是保护公司数据的最佳方式。

我所能得到的只是环境名称并在应用程序中使用它们。 而已; 没有其他的。 这就是为什么有一个指定的人如此重要的原因。 它不仅让员工的生活更轻松，而且还有助于让每个人都在同一个页面上，安全可靠。

环境变量不是应用程序代码的一部分，因此无需对它们进行版本控制。 我从未使用过跟踪密码历史更改的应用程序，我认为没有理由这样做是必要的。 它们只是静态值，不会经常更改。

但无论如何，如果您想对存储在私有仓库中的.env文件应用版本控制，您可以为每个值更改发布一个新版本。

然后作者继续为不存在的问题提供解决方案。 更有趣的是，该解决方案会带来潜在的安全风险。 所以基本上，如果你不想管理你的秘密，就让别人帮你做吧，更不用说你共享的聚会是一个集中的地方。 如果它被泄露，整个该死的世界上每个人的秘密都会暴露出来。

因此，每个人都可以控制自己的秘密，而不是依赖第三方，尤其是在敏感信息的情况下。

作为开发人员，我们使用.env文件来存储环境变量。 这些文件不适用于生产环境，应在将其部署到生产环境之前从代码库中删除/忽略。 如果您曾经使用过容器化应用程序，您就会知道这一点。

在 repo 中有一个.env文件的想法是有一个所需环境变量的示例或模板，作为一种文档形式，告诉该项目需要哪些变量。 它们可以有默认值，但众所周知，它们不应该包含纯文本凭据。 这就像告诉其他开发人员 X、Y 和 Z 在这个应用程序中用作环境变量一样。 在 repo 中有一个.env模板文件可以为其他开发人员设定期望并保持最佳实践。 这将帮助新开发人员克隆存储库并轻松使用它。

然后应用程序应该加载这个模板.env并根据当前环境寻找其他地方来覆盖这些默认值。 这可能是系统上的.env.local文件、已设置系统环境变量或来自配置存储的变量。 如果您曾经使用过 Jenkins 或构建过 DevOps 管道，那么您可能会遇到这种情况。

我们懂了; 在生产环境中使用.env文件不是一个好主意，因为它们可能包含敏感信息，例如数据库密码、API 密钥和其他不应被其他人访问的凭据。

但是，您可以做的一件事是采取额外的预防措施来确保您的.env文件或 env var 的安全。

如果将.env文件用于生产目的，则它是不安全的。 任何有权访问机器的人都可以在未经许可的情况下查看和修改它。

但是，您可以设置此文件的权限。 我不了解你，但你可以使用以下命令来保护你的 env 文件：

这样做， .env文件只能由所有者读取，其他人不能读取。 如果需要将其复制到 docker 映像中，可以在 docker 文件中使用此命令。 但是，通常不鼓励这样做。 在 docker 的情况下，可以使用秘密，这将在后面的部分中讨论。

如果您曾经使用过laravel ，那么在生产环境中使用.env文件的机会很高。 只要您保持安全，就可以了。 以下是 Laravel 开发人员使用的典型安全实践：

 #Disable index view options -Indexes #hide a Specific File <Files .env> order allow, deny Deny from all </Files>

在 docker 中，您可以使用以下命令通过 docker-compose 导入环境变量：

 docker-compose --env-file .env

或者您可以在 YAML 文件中指定 env 文件：

 version : " 3.8" services : frontend : image : awesome/webapp env_file : - .env # path to your .env file

如果你想传递secrets ，那么你可以在docker-compose.yaml文件中定义一个 secrets 部分：

 version : " 3.8" services : frontend : image : awesome/webapp secrets : - server-certificate secrets : server-certificate : file : ./server.cert

如果你正在构建一个 docker 镜像，你可以创建一个 env 文件来存储秘密并将文件挂载到容器中。

 PYPI_USER = dev_bro PYPI_PASS = my_super_duper_secret_token

现在您可以加载.env文件并为其指定一个名为my_secret的 ID。 我们可以在下一步使用此密钥来访问.env文件。 然后修改您的 Dockerfile 以便它挂载秘密。

 FROM python:3.9-slim-buster COPY build-script.sh . RUN --mount = type = secret,id = my_secret . ./build-script.sh
 # build-script.sh: cat /run/secrets/my_secret

现在，您可以构建.env文件并将其注入到容器中：

 export DOCKER_BUILDKIT = 1 docker build --progress = plain -t "my_app" --secret id = my_secret,src = .env . --no-cache

请注意，这些环境变量没有记录到历史记录中，因此运行以下命令不会泄露秘密：

 docker history my_app --no-trunc | grep PYPI_PASS

有关 docker 中秘密的更多信息，您可以参考这篇文档。

此外，如果您使用的是 k8s，则可以使用ConfigMap等 API 对象来存储配置数据，并使用Secrets来存储机密数据。 或者， 您可以在 pod 中设置环境变量。

 apiVersion : v1 kind : Pod metadata : name : dapi-test-pod spec : containers : - name : test-container image : registry.k8s.io/busybox command : [ " /bin/sh" , " -c" , " env" ] env : # Define the environment variable - name : SPECIAL_LEVEL_KEY valueFrom : configMapKeyRef : # The ConfigMap containing the value you want to assign to SPECIAL_LEVEL_KEY name : special-config # Specify the key associated with the value key : special.how restartPolicy : Never

我参与过很多项目，其中一些是开源的。 在像这样的一些项目中，我使用env vars将我的秘密存储在 circleci 中，以自动将新版本发布到 PyPi。

此外，出于安全原因，我注意到 PyPi 实现了一项功能，允许通过使用api 令牌对其服务器进行身份验证，而不再需要密码。 因此，现在您可以将加密的 PyPi 凭据存储在 env vars 中。

如果您曾经使用 Azure DevOps 构建过管道，您可能希望使用Copy files 任务将.env文件复制到 docker 映像中：

 steps : - task : DownloadSecureFile@1 displayName : ' Download secure file' inputs : secureFile : .env - task : CopyFiles@2 displayName : ' Copy Files to: $(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory)' inputs : SourceFolder : ' $(Agent.TempDirectory)' Contents : .env TargetFolder : ' $(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory)'

如果您使用的是 Jenkins，则可以使用envinject 之类的插件注入 env 变量

因此，如您所见，遵循安全使用.env文件的最佳实践取决于您正在处理的应用程序类型。

使用.env文件或环境变量有很多优点，例如：

  • 易于管理：从事过这么多后端项目，我发现.env文件易于管理，因为它们是不言自明的，不需要额外的文档。

  • 简单性： .env文件简化了管理不同后端的任务，因为它允许您在一个地方为每个后端配置所有必要的设置。

  • 调试和测试：因为开发人员可以修改每个应用程序的特定环境，所以变得更容易。

  • 共享：可以将.env.example之类的.env文件模板添加到 git 存储库中，以便团队中的其他开发人员知道该项目使用了哪些环境变量。

为应用程序使用集中式配置服务器时可能会出现几个潜在问题。 如果服务器离线，应用程序将无法启动。 如果服务器更新并重命名了应用程序不期望的环境变量，应用程序可能会在下次重启时崩溃。 最后，如果应用程序是离线托管的，它将无法在没有互联网连接的情况下启动以从外部加载环境变量。

归根结底， .env文件和环境变量可以正常工作，并且对于开发目的来说足够简单，只要您知道如何使用这些文件。 但是，完全由您来选择符合您个人喜好的最佳方法，以及最适合您的特定应用程序或系统的方法。

在 Linux 上，如果要打印当前进程的特定环境变量，例如LOGNAME ，请运行以下命令：

 strings /proc/ $$ /environ | grep LOGNAME

最后但同样重要的是，请记住 Linux 中的所有内容都只是一个文件，包括您刚刚执行的命令：

注意：本文无意以任何方式侮辱任何人； 我只是想与大家分享它以澄清.env的情况并提供一些有关如何使用它们的提示。

祝大家周末愉快。

封面图片由Mike Souza在Flickr上拍摄。



原文:

We all know that first impressions are essential. The same goes for the first sentence of an article. In fact, it might be even more critical for an article because the first sentence is what will determine whether or not someone keeps reading.

But, in the case of this article, stating that working with large-scale systems would make you eligible enough to write about the topic is quite funny. This sentence has a psychological effect that makes readers feel like they are stupid and doomed, assuming they are all working on "Hello World" kind of projects.

Needless to say, as a reader, you may start to wonder: "What in the world does he mean when he said he has worked on large-scale systems?" I mean, literally, everyone is doing that nowadays. I don't think it can be used as a unique selling point or anything; nearly everyone has experience working with large-scale enterprise systems.

Even the most junior engineer has likely worked on a system that processes millions of requests/records daily. So what makes working on large-scale systems so unique? What makes you think your experience is worth anything special? You need to show that you have something unique to offer; otherwise, it's just another redundant sentence in your article. But anyway, let's move on.

Let's start by criticizing each point that looks like a problem with .env files when in reality, they are not problems at all but rather misconceptions.

👉 1. Storing the .env file.

🔝 Go To TOC

This section started by:

The problem is well... It's a file.

Well, I don't know about you and which OS you are currently using, but everything in Linux is literally a file. This includes devices, processes, sockets, files, pipes, etc. However, the critical question is: what's wrong with it?

If you think it is not a good idea to make everything in Linux a file, including env vars, then you have to invite Linus for a debate and discuss the drawbacks of this approach. Provide your solution instead.

Additionally, containers are based on Linux cgroups, namespaces, and other components, which means that they are also built around the concept of everything being a file. This makes Linux a very powerful os for running containers, as everything can be easily managed and controlled via files.

Moreover, everything in k8s is also a file, a YAML file. This concept makes k8s extraordinarily flexible and customizable. You can literally configure anything you want, and there are very few restrictions.

As the author is now working at Google, he has the chance to discuss with the brains behind k8s, argue with them about the drawbacks of files, and share his insights with us. We would love to hear his thoughts on this matter!

Besides, the question is: Who is committing an .env file to public repos? Literally, no one with at least two brain cells is willing to commit an env file, as far as I know. Some developers on github, me included, commits only templates of this file to help other understand the env vars used in a particular project. There is a .gitignore file in case you want to ignore that file from being committed; that's the basics, and everyone should be aware of that.

Even if you don't like to include a .gitignore file for each new repo, you can add a new entry in a global ~/.gitignore file, so you don't have to worry about including that file each time when creating a new repo.

Now, you may wonder: well, how to share the .env file with other developers? And the answer goes like this: If you're collaborating with other people on a project, it's essential to keep your .env file private so that only invited collaborators can see it(e.g., create a private repo for the .env file).

👉 2. Updating a secret config

🔝 Go To TOC

I have never had access to updating a database password throughout my years working at companies. This is because there is always someone responsible for managing databases, a DBA. Having access to update passwords would be a huge responsibility and could potentially lead to security breaches.

So, having someone responsible ensures that passwords are kept up to date and secure. It also means that if there is ever a problem with a password, there is only one person who needs to be contacted to fix it. This system may not be perfect, but it is the best way to protect company data.

All I can get are env names and use them within the app. That's it; Nothing else. This is why having a designated person is so important. Not only does it make life easier for employees, but it also helps keep everyone on the same page, safe, and secure.

👉 3. Versioning.

🔝 Go To TOC

Environment variables are not parts of the app code, so there is no need to version them. I have never used an app that keeps track of password history changes, and I see no reason why this would be necessary. They are just static values and don't change often.

But in any case, if you want to apply versioning to an .env file stored in a private repo, you can release a new version for each value change.

Then the author proceeds to provide a solution to a problem that doesn't exist. What's even funnier is that the solution leads to potential security risks. So basically, let someone else do it for you if you don't want to manage your secrets, not to mention that the party you share with is a centralized place. If it gets compromised, everyone's secrets in the whole damn world will get exposed.

So, everyone would instead have control over their secrets and not depend on third parties, especially in case of sensitive information.

👉 Why .env file?

🔝 Go To TOC

We, as developers, use .env files to store environment variables. These files are not meant for use in production and should be removed/ignored from the codebase before deploying it to production. If you have ever worked with containerized apps, you would know that.

The idea of having an .env file in a repo is to have an example or template of the required env vars as a form of documentation that tells which variables are needed for this project. They could have default values, but as we all know, they should never contain plain text credentials. It is like telling other developers that X, Y, and Z are used in this app as env vars. Having an .env template file in a repo sets expectations for other developers and maintains best practices. This would help new developers clone the repo and work with it without any hassle.

The application should then load this template .env and look for other places to override these default values depending on the current environment. This could be a .env.local file on the system, already set system environment variables, or variables from config storage. If you ever used Jenkins or built a DevOps pipeline, you probably encountered that.

We get it; it is not a good idea to use .env files in production because they can contain sensitive information like database passwords, API keys, and other credentials that should not be accessible to others.

However, one thing you can do though is to take additional precautions to keep your .env file or env vars secure and safe.

👉 Securing an .env file?

🔝 Go To TOC

An .env file is not secure if it's being used for production purposes. Anyone with access to the machine can view and modify it without permission.

However, you can set permissions for this file. I don't know about you, but you can use the following command to secure your env file:

Doing so, the .env file can only be read by the owner and no one else. You can use this command in a docker file if you need to copy it into the docker image. But, usually, it is not encouraged to do so. In the case of docker, secrets can be used, which are discussed later in the following sections.

If you have ever worked with laravel, the chances of using the .env file in production are high. And that is ok as long as you keep it secure. The following is a typical security practice used by Laravel developers:

#Disable index view
options -Indexes #hide a Specific File

<Files .env>
order allow, deny
Deny from all
</Files>

In docker, you can import env variables with docker-compose using the following command:

docker-compose --env-file .env

Or you can specify the env file within the YAML file:

version: "3.8" services: frontend: image: awesome/webapp env_file: - .env # path to your .env file

If you want to pass secrets, then you can define a secrets section within the docker-compose.yaml file:

version: "3.8" services: frontend: image: awesome/webapp secrets: - server-certificate secrets: server-certificate: file: ./server.cert

If you are building a docker image, you can create an env file to store secrets and mount the file to the container.

PYPI_USER=dev_bro
PYPI_PASS=my_super_duper_secret_token

Now you can load the .env file and give it an id called my_secret. We can use this key in the next step to access the .env file. Then modify your Dockerfile so that it mounts the secrets.

FROM python:3.9-slim-buster
COPY build-script.sh .
RUN --mount=type=secret,id=my_secret . ./build-script.sh

# build-script.sh:
cat /run/secrets/my_secret

Now, you can build and inject the .env file into the container:

export DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1
docker build --progress=plain -t "my_app" --secret id=my_secret,src=.env . --no-cache

Note that these env vars are not logged into the history, so running the following command won't reveal the secrets:

docker history my_app --no-trunc | grep PYPI_PASS

For more info about secrets in docker, you can refer to this piece of docs.

Additionally, if you are using k8s, there are API objects like ConfigMap to store config data and Secrets to store confidential data. Or, you can set env vars within a pod.

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata: name: dapi-test-pod spec: containers: - name: test-container image: registry.k8s.io/busybox command: [ "/bin/sh", "-c", "env" ] env: # Define the environment variable - name: SPECIAL_LEVEL_KEY valueFrom: configMapKeyRef: # The ConfigMap containing the value you want to assign to SPECIAL_LEVEL_KEY name: special-config # Specify the key associated with the value key: special.how restartPolicy: Never

I have worked on many projects, some of which are open source. In some projects like this one, I used env vars to store my secrets within circleci to publish a new version to PyPi automatically.

Moreover, for security reasons, I have noticed that PyPi has implemented a feature to allow authentication with their servers through using api tokens without the need for passwords anymore. So, now you can store encrypted PyPi credentials within env vars.

If you ever built a pipeline with Azure DevOps, you probably wanted to copy the .env file into the docker image using Copy files task:

steps:
- task: DownloadSecureFile@1 displayName: 'Download secure file' inputs: secureFile: .env - task: CopyFiles@2 displayName: 'Copy Files to: $(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory)' inputs: SourceFolder: '$(Agent.TempDirectory)' Contents: .env TargetFolder: '$(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory)'

If you are using Jenkins, you can inject env variables using plugins like envinject

So, as you can see, it depends on the type of applications you are dealing with to follow the best practices to securely use an .env file.

👉 Advantages of using an .env file.

🔝 Go To TOC

There are so many advantages to using .env files or environment variables, such as:

  • Ease of management: Having worked on so many backend projects, I find .env files easy to manage because they are self-explanatory and don't require additional documentation.

  • Simplicity: .env files simplify the task of managing different backends because it allows you to configure all the necessary settings for each backend in one place.

  • Debugging and testing: It becomes easier because developers can modify a specific environment for each application.

  • Sharing: .env files templates like .env.example can be added to git repositories, so other developers on the team know what environment variables were used for that project.

👉 Problems With Centralized Config Servers.

🔝 Go To TOC

Several potential problems can occur when using a centralized config server for an application. If the server goes offline, the app will not be able to start. If the server updates and renames an environment variable that the app is not expecting, the app may crash on the next restart. Finally, if the app is hosted offline, it will not be able to start without an internet connection to load the env vars from outside.

👉 Conclusion.

🔝 Go To TOC

At the end of the day, .env files and environment variables work fine and are simple enough for development purposes, as long as you know how to use these files. However, it is totally up to you to choose the best approach that aligns with your personal preferences, what works best for your particular application or system.

👉 Bonus For Linux Enjoyers.

🔝 Go To TOC

On Linux, if you want to print out a specific environment variable, like LOGNAME, of the current process, then run the following command:

strings /proc/$$/environ | grep LOGNAME

And last but not least, remember that everything in Linux is just a file including the command that you have just executed:

Note: This article is not meant to insult anyone by any means; I just wanted to share it with everyone to clarify the situation with .env and give some tips on how to use them.

Have a lovely weekend, folks.

Cover image by Mike Souza, on Flickr.
item.author: wiseai

item.title: GDPR 对每个人来说都很重要，但为什么呢？ | GDPR is Important for Everyone to Understand, But Why?
item.description:
无论您身在何处，明智的做法是确保您符合 GDPR，Drata 可以为您提供帮助。

在https://drata.com/gdpr查看 Drata 的 GDPR 合规工具
在此处观看对 Dan Lines 的完整采访： https ://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K_ce_YmtJUw

想知道 Slack 和 Stripe 的工程师如何将他们的开发团队的工作与业务底线联系起来吗？ 或者 Shopify 和 CircleCI 的团队领导如何保持精英周期时间，同时最大限度地减少开发人员倦怠和最大限度地保留？

这些只是我们将于 10 月 25 日在Interact上讨论的两个主题。

贡献代码库或托管您自己的代码库。

看看这些！ 主要 Forem 回购

  • 自托管说明

    • 一旦暂停，linearb 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

    一旦解除暂停，linearb 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，所有由 linearb 发布的帖子都将被隐藏并且只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 linearb 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 linearb 的方法：

    取消标记 linearb 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。

    Drata Co-Founder Daniel Marashlian joins Dev Interrupted to tell us what a GDPR compliance checklist is and the best ways to implement it into your business and product. No matter where you're located, it's wise to make sure you are GDPR compliant, and Drata can help you out.

item.author: conorbronsdon

item.title: 📊 统计 GitHub 问题上的评论 🎫 | 📊 Count comments on a GitHub issue 🎫
item.description:
有很多评论有两种类型的问题：

一旦暂停，optnc 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，optnc 将能够再次评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，optnc 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 optnc 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 optnc 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 optnc 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

There are two type issues with a lot of comments :

1️⃣ The ones that are popular, then getting a lot of feedback 🤗
2️⃣ The ones that have a lot of comments because we struggle to fix them efficiently 😱

👉 In both cases, performing report on them can be helpful to monitor your RUN performances.

❔ Count with API calls

☝️ There actually is no native gh issue command to count issues on a specific command...

👉 but gh api...

"Makes an authenticated HTTP request to the GitHub API and prints the response."

gh api <endpoint> [flags]

💡 This short post is documenting how easy it is to count comments on a given issue.

🤓 Snippet 

gh api -X GET \ -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" \ -F per_page=100 \ /repos/YOUR_ORGA/REPO/issues/ISSUEID/comments | \ jq '. | length'

 
📚 You can adjust your experience level in Settings to see more relevant content.

Jan Schenk (he/him) - Sep 16

Once suspended, optnc will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, optnc will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by optnc will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If optnc is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag optnc:

optnc consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging optnc will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.description:

我们是程序员分享、了解最新信息和发展事业的地方。

    Share to Twitter Share to LinkedIn Share to Reddit Share to Hacker News Share to Facebook 分享到 Twitter 分享到 LinkedIn 分享到 Reddit 分享到 Hacker News 分享到 Facebook
    报告滥用
    魏

    发表于Sep 25 9月25日

    MiniWord easy and effective .NET Word Template library MiniWord 简单有效的 .NET Word 模板库

    # dotnet # csharp # office #dotnet #csharp #office

    Github Link : https://github.com/mini-software/MiniWord Github 链接： https ://github.com/mini-software/MiniWord

    介绍

    MiniWord is an easy and effective .NET Word Template library. MiniWord 是一个简单有效的 .NET Word 模板库。

    入门

    安装

    • 包 xml <PackageReference Include="MiniWord" Version="0.4.0" />
    • 或 .NET CLI： dotnet add package MiniWord --version 0.4.0

    快速开始

    模板遵循“所见即所得”的设计，模板标签样式完整保留。

     var value = new Dictionary < string , object >(){[ "title" ] = "Hello MiniWord" }; MiniSoftware . MiniWord . SaveAsByTemplate ( outputPath , templatePath , value );

    输入输出

    • 输入支持文件路径，byte[]
    • 输出支持文件路径、byte[]、stream
     SaveAsByTemplate ( string path , string templatePath , Dictionary < string , object > value ) SaveAsByTemplate ( string path , byte [] templateBytes , Dictionary < string , object > value ) SaveAsByTemplate ( this Stream stream , string templatePath , Dictionary < string , object > value ) SaveAsByTemplate ( this Stream stream , byte [] templateBytes , Dictionary < string , object > value )

    标签

    MiniWord template format string like Vue, React {{tag}} ，users only need to make sure tag and value parameter key same then system will replace them automatically. MiniWord 模板格式字符串，如 Vue、React {{tag}} ，用户只需确保 tag 和 value 参数 key 相同，系统会自动替换。

    文本

    {{ tag }}
    例子
    var value = new Dictionary < string , object >() { [ "Name" ] = "Jack" , [ "Department" ] = "IT Department" , [ "Purpose" ] = "Shanghai site needs a new system to control HR system." , [ "StartDate" ] = DateTime . Parse ( "2022-09-07 08:30:00" ), [ "EndDate" ] = DateTime . Parse ( "2022-09-15 15:30:00" ), [ "Approved" ] = true , [ "Total_Amount" ] = 123456 , }; MiniWord . SaveAsByTemplate ( path , templatePath , value );
    模板

    结果

    图片

    例子
    var value = new Dictionary < string , object >() { [ "Logo" ] = new MiniWordPicture () { Path = PathHelper . GetFile ( "DemoLogo.png" ), Width = 180 , Height = 180 } }; MiniWord . SaveAsByTemplate ( path , templatePath , value );
    模板

    结果

    列表

    标记值为string[]或IList<string>类型

    例子
    var value = new Dictionary < string , object >() { [ "managers" ] = new [] { "Jack" , "Alan" }, [ "employees" ] = new [] { "Mike" , "Henry" }, }; MiniWord . SaveAsByTemplate ( path , templatePath , value );

    模板

    结果

    桌子

    标签值为IEmerable<Dictionary<string,object>>类型

    例子
    var value = new Dictionary < string , object >() { [ "TripHs" ] = new List < Dictionary < string , object >> { new Dictionary < string , object > { { "sDate" , DateTime . Parse ( "2022-09-08 08:30:00" )}, { "eDate" , DateTime . Parse ( "2022-09-08 15:00:00" )}, { "How" , "Discussion requirement part1" }, { "Photo" , new MiniWordPicture () { Path = PathHelper . GetFile ( "DemoExpenseMeeting02.png" ), Width = 160 , Height = 90 }}, }, new Dictionary < string , object > { { "sDate" , DateTime . Parse ( "2022-09-09 08:30:00" )}, { "eDate" , DateTime . Parse ( "2022-09-09 17:00:00" )}, { "How" , "Discussion requirement part2 and development" }, { "Photo" , new MiniWordPicture () { Path = PathHelper . GetFile ( "DemoExpenseMeeting01.png" ), Width = 160 , Height = 90 }}, }, } }; MiniWord . SaveAsByTemplate ( path , templatePath , value );
    模板

    结果

    其他

    POCO or dynamic parameter POCO 或动态参数

    v0.5.0 support POCO or dynamic parameter v0.5.0 支持 POCO 或动态参数

    var value = new { title = "Hello MiniWord" }; MiniWord . SaveAsByTemplate ( outputPath , templatePath , value );

    字体颜色和高亮颜色

    var value = new { Company_Name = new MiniWordColorText { Text = "MiniSofteware" , FontColor = "#eb70AB" }, Name = new MiniWordColorText { Text = "Jack" , HighlightColor = "#eb70AB" }, CreateDate = new MiniWordColorText { Text = new DateTime ( 2021 , 01 , 01 ). ToString (), HighlightColor = "#eb70AB" , FontColor = "#ffffff" }, VIP = true , Points = 123 , APP = "Demo APP" , };

    超链接

    如果值类型是MiniWordHyperLink系统将用超链接替换模板字符串。

    • 文字：描述
    var value = new { [ "Name" ] = new MiniWordHyperLink (){ Url = "https://google.com" , Text = "Test Link!!" }, [ "Company_Name" ] = "MiniSofteware" , [ "CreateDate" ] = new DateTime ( 2021 , 01 , 01 ), [ "VIP" ] = true , [ "Points" ] = 123 , [ "APP" ] = "Demo APP" , }; MiniWord . SaveAsByTemplate ( path , templatePath , value );

    例子

    热门评论(0)

    排序讨论：

    • 最佳
      最受好评和相关的评论将排在第一位
    • 最新的
      最近的评论将是第一
    • 最老的
      最早的评论将是第一个
    订阅
    创建模板

    模板可让您快速回答常见问题解答或存储片段以供重复使用。

    行为准则•举报滥用行为

    确定要隐藏此评论吗？ 它将隐藏在您的帖子中，但仍可通过评论的永久链接看到。

    也隐藏子评论

    如需采取进一步行动，您可以考虑屏蔽此人和/或举报滥用行为

    继续阅读

    实体框架核心添加（如果不存在）

    亚历克斯 - 帮助您学习或提高技能的 10 本最佳 C# 书籍📚

    字节隐藏 - 如何在 ASP.NET MVC 中使用 HttpClient 来使用 ASP.NET Web API REST 服务？

    哈沙尔·苏塔尔—— 魏

    已加入
    更多来自魏
    暂停后，shps951023 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

    解除暂停后，shps951023 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，shps951023 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 shps951023 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    一旦未发布，该帖子将不为公众所知，只有 Wei 可以访问。

    如果他们没有被暂停，他们仍然可以重新发布帖子。

    感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 shps951023 的方法：

    shps951023 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy. shps951023 不断发布违反 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 行为准则的内容，因为它具有骚扰性、冒犯性或垃圾信息。

    Report other inappropriate conduct 举报其他不当行为

    取消标记 shps951023 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。

    与您同行的每一步。

    Wei

    Posted on Sep 25

    MiniWord easy and effective .NET Word Template library

    #dotnet #csharp #office

    Github Link : https://github.com/mini-software/MiniWord

    Introduction

    MiniWord is an easy and effective .NET Word Template library.

    Getting Started

    Installation

    • nuget link : https://www.nuget.org/packages/MiniWord
    • Packge xml <PackageReference Include="MiniWord" Version="0.4.0" />
    • Or .NET CLI : dotnet add package MiniWord --version 0.4.0

    Quick Start

    Template follow "WHAT you see is what you get" design，and the template tag styles are completely preserved.

    var value = new Dictionary<string, object>(){["title"] = "Hello MiniWord"};
MiniSoftware.MiniWord.SaveAsByTemplate(outputPath, templatePath, value);

    Input, Output

    • Input support file path, byte[]
    • Output support file path, byte[], stream 
    SaveAsByTemplate(string path, string templatePath, Dictionary<string, object> value)
SaveAsByTemplate(string path, byte[] templateBytes, Dictionary<string, object> value)
SaveAsByTemplate(this Stream stream, string templatePath, Dictionary<string, object> value)
SaveAsByTemplate(this Stream stream, byte[] templateBytes, Dictionary<string, object> value)

    Tags

    MiniWord template format string like Vue, React {{tag}}，users only need to make sure tag and value parameter key same then system will replace them automatically.

    Text 

    {{tag}}
    Example 
    var value = new Dictionary<string, object>()
{
    ["Name"] = "Jack",
    ["Department"] = "IT Department",
    ["Purpose"] = "Shanghai site needs a new system to control HR system.",
    ["StartDate"] = DateTime.Parse("2022-09-07 08:30:00"),
    ["EndDate"] = DateTime.Parse("2022-09-15 15:30:00"),
    ["Approved"] = true,
    ["Total_Amount"] = 123456,
};
MiniWord.SaveAsByTemplate(path, templatePath, value);
    Template

    Result

    Image

    Example 
    var value = new Dictionary<string, object>()
{
    ["Logo"] = new MiniWordPicture() { Path= PathHelper.GetFile("DemoLogo.png"), Width= 180, Height= 180 }
};
MiniWord.SaveAsByTemplate(path, templatePath, value);
    Template

    Result

    List

    tag value is string[] or IList<string> type

    Example 
    var value = new Dictionary<string, object>()
{
    ["managers"] = new[] { "Jack" ,"Alan"},
    ["employees"] = new[] { "Mike" ,"Henry"},
};
MiniWord.SaveAsByTemplate(path, templatePath, value);

    Template

    Result

    Table

    Tag value is IEmerable<Dictionary<string,object>> type

    Example 
    var value = new Dictionary<string, object>()
{
    ["TripHs"] = new List<Dictionary<string, object>>
    {
        new Dictionary<string, object>
        {
            { "sDate",DateTime.Parse("2022-09-08 08:30:00")},
            { "eDate",DateTime.Parse("2022-09-08 15:00:00")},
            { "How","Discussion requirement part1"},
            { "Photo",new MiniWordPicture() { Path = PathHelper.GetFile("DemoExpenseMeeting02.png"), Width = 160, Height = 90 }},
        },
        new Dictionary<string, object>
        {
            { "sDate",DateTime.Parse("2022-09-09 08:30:00")},
            { "eDate",DateTime.Parse("2022-09-09 17:00:00")},
            { "How","Discussion requirement part2 and development"},
            { "Photo",new MiniWordPicture() { Path = PathHelper.GetFile("DemoExpenseMeeting01.png"), Width = 160, Height = 90 }},
        },
    }
};
MiniWord.SaveAsByTemplate(path, templatePath, value);
    Template

    Result

    Other

    POCO or dynamic parameter

    v0.5.0 support POCO or dynamic parameter

    var value = new { title = "Hello MiniWord" };
MiniWord.SaveAsByTemplate(outputPath, templatePath, value);

    FontColor and HighlightColor 

    var value = new
{
    Company_Name = new MiniWordColorText { Text = "MiniSofteware", FontColor = "#eb70AB" },
    Name = new MiniWordColorText { Text = "Jack", HighlightColor = "#eb70AB" },
    CreateDate = new MiniWordColorText { Text = new DateTime(2021, 01, 01).ToString(), HighlightColor = "#eb70AB", FontColor = "#ffffff" },
    VIP = true,
    Points = 123,
    APP = "Demo APP",
};

    HyperLink

    If value type is MiniWordHyperLink system will replace template string by hyperlink.

    • Url： HyperLink URI target path
    • Text：Description 
    var value = new 
{
    ["Name"] = new MiniWordHyperLink(){
        Url = "https://google.com",
        Text = "Test Link!!"
    },
    ["Company_Name"] = "MiniSofteware",
    ["CreateDate"] = new DateTime(2021, 01, 01),
    ["VIP"] = true,
    ["Points"] = 123,
    ["APP"] = "Demo APP",
};
MiniWord.SaveAsByTemplate(path, templatePath, value);

    Examples

    ASP.NET Core 3.1 API Export 

    using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Hosting;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Net;
using MiniSoftware;

public class Program
{
    public static void Main(string[] args) => CreateHostBuilder(args).Build().Run();

    public static IHostBuilder CreateHostBuilder(string[] args) => Host.CreateDefaultBuilder(args).ConfigureWebHostDefaults(webBuilder => webBuilder.UseStartup<Startup>());
}

public class Startup
{
    public void ConfigureServices(IServiceCollection services) => services.AddMvc();
    public void Configure(IApplicationBuilder app, IWebHostEnvironment env)
    {
        app.UseStaticFiles();
        app.UseRouting();
        app.UseEndpoints(endpoints =>
        {
            endpoints.MapControllerRoute(
                name: "default",
                pattern: "{controller=api}/{action=Index}/{id?}");
        });
    }
}

public class ApiController : Controller
{
    public IActionResult Index()
    {
        return new ContentResult
        {
            ContentType = "text/html",
            StatusCode = (int)HttpStatusCode.OK,
            Content = @"<html><body>
<a href='api/DownloadWordFromTemplatePath'>DownloadWordFromTemplatePath</a><br>
<a href='api/DownloadWordFromTemplateBytes'>DownloadWordFromTemplateBytes</a><br>
</body></html>"
        };
    }

    static Dictionary<string, object> defaultValue = new Dictionary<string, object>()
    {
        ["title"] = "FooCompany",
        ["managers"] = new List<Dictionary<string, object>> {
            new Dictionary<string, object>{{"name","Jack"},{ "department", "HR" } },
            new Dictionary<string, object> {{ "name", "Loan"},{ "department", "IT" } }
        },
        ["employees"] = new List<Dictionary<string, object>> {
            new Dictionary<string, object>{{ "name", "Wade" },{ "department", "HR" } },
            new Dictionary<string, object> {{ "name", "Felix" },{ "department", "HR" } },
            new Dictionary<string, object>{{ "name", "Eric" },{ "department", "IT" } },
            new Dictionary<string, object> {{ "name", "Keaton" },{ "department", "IT" } }
        }
    };

    public IActionResult DownloadWordFromTemplatePath()
    {
        string templatePath = "TestTemplateComplex.docx";

        Dictionary<string, object> value = defaultValue;

        MemoryStream memoryStream = new MemoryStream();
        MiniWord.SaveAsByTemplate(memoryStream, templatePath, value);
        memoryStream.Seek(0, SeekOrigin.Begin);
        return new FileStreamResult(memoryStream, "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document")
        {
            FileDownloadName = "demo.docx"
        };
    }

    private static Dictionary<string, Byte[]> TemplateBytesCache = new Dictionary<string, byte[]>();

    static ApiController()
    {
        string templatePath = "TestTemplateComplex.docx";
        byte[] bytes = System.IO.File.ReadAllBytes(templatePath);
        TemplateBytesCache.Add(templatePath, bytes);
    }

    public IActionResult DownloadWordFromTemplateBytes()
    {
        byte[] bytes = TemplateBytesCache["TestTemplateComplex.docx"];

        Dictionary<string, object> value = defaultValue;

        MemoryStream memoryStream = new MemoryStream();
        MiniWord.SaveAsByTemplate(memoryStream, bytes, value);
        memoryStream.Seek(0, SeekOrigin.Begin);
        return new FileStreamResult(memoryStream, "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document")
        {
            FileDownloadName = "demo.docx"
        };
    }
}

item.title: 使用 Rector 从 PHP 7.4 安全升级到 8.1 | Safely upgrade from PHP 7.4 to 8.1 using Rector
item.description:
我必须从一开始就说，唯一接近安全升级代码库的就是拥有一套可靠的自动化测试。 没有什么比屏幕上跳舞的一堆绿色复选标记更能让您感到舒适了。

话虽如此，我们将升级一个在即将死亡的PHP 7.4 (11 月 28 日)上运行的 Laravel 项目。 目前，最后一个稳定的 PHP 版本是 8.1，我们将使用名为Rector的工具升级到它。 事不宜迟，这是我遵循的步骤。

将composer.json更改为新的 PHP 8.1

 "require" : { "php" : "^8.1" , ...
}

除了手动更改composer.json中的版本外，我还更改了我的环境以使用 PHP 8.1。 在 Homestead 中，只需运行php81即可完成。 在 Valet 中，该命令是valet use php@8.1 。 如果您在 Windows 上并使用 Wamp 或 Xampp，那么祝您好运😁。

做composer update

更改环境后，我运行了一个不错但有风险的composer update 。 对此并不完全确定，因为可能有一种更清洁的方法，但我猜作曲家需要检查所有包并将其更新为指定的 PHP 版本。

这是您可能会卡住并面临作曲家错误的地方，因为并非您使用的所有软件包都支持新的 PHP。

检查可能损坏的包裹

在这个特定的项目中，唯一没有支持的包是fzaninotto/faker ，那是因为该项目自 2020 年以来已经说了晚安。 不过好消息是，它还有一个替代方案，称为fakerphp/faker ，您可以直接在 composer.json 中使用它（ "fzaninotto/faker" => "fakerphp/faker" ）。 而且你不需要改变你工厂的任何东西，它就可以工作。

运行测试

在这一点上，我运行测试，我注意到没有任何中断，它们都通过了。 唷。
但是，如果它对您来说并不顺利，或者您没有测试，请在此处查看弃用。 只需确保您已经处理了这些并忽略新语法，因为我们不会以旧的方式升级到它。 只需提交您的更改，这样您就可以清楚地了解语法更改。

安装、配置和运行 Rector

 composer require rector/rector --dev vendor/bin/rector init

此命令将为您安装 Rector 并在项目的根目录下创建一个rector.php文件。 您可以修改它以告诉 Rector 将所有代码库升级到 PHP 8.1，使用以下配置：

 return static function ( RectorConfig $rectorConfig ): void { $rectorConfig -> paths ([ __DIR__ . '/app' , ]); $rectorConfig -> importNames (); $rectorConfig -> sets ([ LevelSetList :: UP_TO_PHP_81 , ]); $rectorConfig -> skip ([ SpatieEnumClassToEnumRector :: class , ]); };

我们将很快讨论最后一条规则，但现在您应该可以运行vendor/bin/rector --dry-run 。 如果您的代码库很大，您将不得不等待一两分钟。 完成后，您将看到所有要应用的更改，例如 git diff。 如果您省略--dry-run它将继续对您的代码进行所有这些更改，因此您可以选择要保留在您选择的差异浏览器中的内容。

最后一条规则SpatieEnumClassToEnumRector被跳过，因为我正在使用spatie/enum包，并且我不希望它自动转换为 PHP 原生枚举。 原因是 Spatie 包有一些不错的小帮手，我认为手动迁移一些枚举更安全。

我想指出的另一个小问题是match表达式。 与switch不同，它会进行严格的比较，如果不加以检查，可能会造成一些损害。 作为补救措施，您可以使用match (true) {...}版本，它不是那么漂亮，但会像switch那样做一个松散的比较。

我不打算讨论 8.1 中的新功能以及 Rector将为您做什么，但该死的，看到所有代码自己清理的感觉真好。 您只需要尝试一下，见鬼，让测试中断，然后运行它。

最初发表于https://blog.genijaho.dev 。



原文:

I have to say it from the start, the only thing that comes close to safely upgrading a codebase is having a solid set of automated tests. Nothing gives you more comfort than a bunch of green checkmarks dancing on the screen.

With that said, we're going to upgrade a Laravel project running on the soon-to-be-dead PHP 7.4 (Nov 28). Currently, the last stable PHP version is 8.1 and we're going to upgrade to it using a tool called Rector. Rector will help us move on to the new syntax in a very comfortable way.

Without further ado, here are the steps I followed.

Change composer.json to the new PHP 8.1 

"require": { "php": "^8.1", ...
}

Alongside manually changing the version in composer.json, I also changed my environment to use PHP 8.1. In Homestead, that's done simply by running php81. In Valet that command is valet use php@8.1. If you're on Windows and using Wamp or Xampp, well, good luck 😁.

Do a composer update

After changing the environment, I ran a nice and risky composer update. Not entirely sure about this, as there might be a cleaner way, but I guess composer needs to check and update all packages to the specified PHP version.

This is the point where you'll probably get stuck and face composer errors because not all packages you use support the new PHP.

Check for packages that might break

In this particular project, the only package that did not have support was fzaninotto/faker, and that's because that project has said goodnight since 2020. Good news though, there's an alternative to it called fakerphp/faker, which you can just use directly in composer.json ("fzaninotto/faker" => "fakerphp/faker"). And you don't need to change a thing in your factories, it just works.

Run the tests

At this point, I run the tests, and I notice nothing breaks, they're all passing. Phew.
However, if it doesn't go as smoothly for you, or you don't have tests, check out the deprecations here. Just make sure that you've handled those and ignore the new syntax, because we're not going to upgrade to it the old fashion way. Just commit your changes so you have a clean slate for the syntax changes.

Install, configure, and run Rector 

composer require rector/rector --dev
vendor/bin/rector init

This command will install Rector for you and create a rector.php file at the root of your project. You can modify it to tell Rector to upgrade all the codebase up to PHP 8.1, with this configuration:

return static function (RectorConfig $rectorConfig): void { $rectorConfig->paths([ __DIR__ . '/app', ]); $rectorConfig->importNames(); $rectorConfig->sets([ LevelSetList::UP_TO_PHP_81, ]); $rectorConfig->skip([ SpatieEnumClassToEnumRector::class, ]);
};

We'll discuss that last rule shortly, but now you should be able to run vendor/bin/rector --dry-run. If your codebase is huge, you'll have to wait a minute or two. When it's done you'll see all the changes that are to be applied, like a git diff. If you omit the --dry-run it will instead go ahead and do all those changes to your code, so you can pick what you want to keep in your diff browser of choice.

That last rule SpatieEnumClassToEnumRector is skipped because I'm using the spatie/enum package, and I don't want it to be converted to PHP native enums automatically. The reason for that is that the Spatie package has some nice little helpers, and it's safer in my opinion to migrate some of the enums manually.

Another little gotcha I want to point out is with the match expression. It does strict comparisons, unlike switch, and that might do some damage if left unchecked. As a remedy, you can use the match (true) {...} version, which is not as beautiful but will do a loose comparison like the switch.

I'm not going to go over what's new in 8.1 and what Rector will do for you, but damn it feels good to see all the code clean itself. PHPStorm supports it out of the box. You just have to try it, heck, let the tests break, just run it.

Originally published at https://blog.genijaho.dev.
item.author: genijaho

item.title: 如何使用 AWK 解析 Azure 单服务器 PostgreSQL 日志文件？ | How to parse Azure Single Server PostgreSQL log files using AWK?
item.description:
德米特里·罗曼诺夫

发表于它非常强大并且使用简单的编程语言。 它可以用几行代码解决复杂的文本处理任务。

这篇文章演示了如何使用 AWK 解析 Azure 单服务器 PostgreSQL 日志文件。

如何以小时：分钟 db_user 格式列出“连接授权”文本模式出现？

 grep "connection authorized" postgresql-2021-12-09_100000.log | awk ' { printf("%s %s\n", substr($2, 1, 5), substr($6, index($6,"user=")+5, index($6, "database=")-6)); } ' 10:59 db_user_1 10:59 db_user_2 10:59 db_user_1 10:59 db_user_2 10:59 db_user_2

如何按降序排序的“连接授权”文本模式出现列出顶级数据库用户？

 grep "connection authorized" postgresql-2021-12-09_100000.log | awk ' { printf("%s %s\n", substr($2, 1, 5), substr($6, index($6,"user=")+5, index($6, "database=")-6)); } ' | awk '{count[$2]++} END {for (word in count) print word, count[word]}' | sort -k 2,2 -n -r db_user_1 1821 db_user_2 196 db_user_3 136 db_user_4 136 db_user_5 130

如何按出现次数降序排列每小时：分钟（HH24：MI）的“连接授权”文本模式出现的分布？

 grep "connection authorized" postgresql-2021-12-09_100000.log | awk ' { printf("%s %s\n", substr($2, 1, 5), substr($6, index($6,"user=")+5, index($6, "database=")-6)); } ' | awk '{count[$1]++} END {for (word in count) print word, count[word]}' | sort -k 2,2 -n -r 10:53 644 10:23 509 10:29 502 10:22 479 10:52 463

如何按出现次数降序排列每小时：分钟：秒（HH24：MI：SS）的“连接授权”文本模式出现的分布？

 grep "connection authorized" postgresql-2021-12-09_100000.log | awk ' { printf("%s,%s\n", substr($2, 1, 7), $6) } ' 10:29:44 90 10:28:15 67 10:35:02 61 10:05:51 57 10:30:36 56

马西米利亚诺多尼尼 - 一旦暂停，dm8ry 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，dm8ry 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，dm8ry 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 dm8ry 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 dm8ry 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 dm8ry 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Dmitry Romanoff

Posted on Sep 25

AWK is a text-processing utility on GNU/Linux. It is very powerful and uses a simple programming language. It can solve complex text processing tasks with a few lines of code.

This post demonstrates how to parse Azure Single Server PostgreSQL log files using AWK.

How to list “connection authorized” text pattern occurrences in the hour:minute db_user format? 

grep "connection authorized" postgresql-2021-12-09_100000.log | awk ' { printf("%s %s\n", substr($2, 1, 5), substr($6, index($6,"user=")+5, index($6, "database=")-6)); } '

10:59 db_user_1
10:59 db_user_2
10:59 db_user_1
10:59 db_user_2
10:59 db_user_2

How to list top DB users by “connection authorized” text pattern occurrences sorted in descending order? 

grep "connection authorized" postgresql-2021-12-09_100000.log | awk ' { printf("%s %s\n", substr($2, 1, 5), substr($6, index($6,"user=")+5, index($6, "database=")-6)); } ' | awk '{count[$2]++} END {for (word in count) print word, count[word]}' | sort -k 2,2 -n -r

db_user_1 1821
db_user_2 196
db_user_3 136
db_user_4 136
db_user_5 130

How to list the distribution of “connection authorized” text pattern occurrences per hour:minute (HH24:MI) sorted in descending order by the number of occurrences? 

grep "connection authorized" postgresql-2021-12-09_100000.log | awk ' { printf("%s %s\n", substr($2, 1, 5), substr($6, index($6,"user=")+5, index($6, "database=")-6)); } ' | awk '{count[$1]++} END {for (word in count) print word, count[word]}' | sort -k 2,2 -n -r

10:53 644
10:23 509
10:29 502
10:22 479
10:52 463

How to list the distribution of “connection authorized” text pattern occurrences per hour:minute:second (HH24:MI:SS) sorted in descending order by the number of occurrences? 

grep "connection authorized" postgresql-2021-12-09_100000.log | awk ' { printf("%s,%s\n", substr($2, 1, 7), $6) } '

10:29:44  90
10:28:15  67
10:35:02  61
10:05:51  57
10:30:36  56

Massimiliano Donini - May 26

Once suspended, dm8ry will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, dm8ry will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by dm8ry will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If dm8ry is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag dm8ry:

dm8ry consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging dm8ry will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.title: 运营商... | Operators...
item.description:
贾莫尔·梅利耶夫

发表于运营商尼玛？

  • 尼玛·瓦兹法拉尔尼·巴哈拉·奥拉迪？

    • Operatorlar bizga C++ dasturlash tilida yoki boshqa bir ixtiyoriy dasturlash tilida ham matematik amallarni amalga oshirganimizda ishlatimiz mumkin. Operatorlar bizga C++ dasturlash tilida yoki boshqa bir ixtiyoriy dasturlash tilida ham matematik amallarni amalga oshirganimizda ishlatimiz mumkin。 Operatorlarga bazi misollarni keltirib o'tsam, "+" , "-", "*" , "/" , "%" kabi amallar asosiy operatorlar turlari sanaladi. Operatorlarga bazi misollarni keltirib o'tsam, "+" , "-", "*" , "/" , "%" kabi amallar asosiy operatorlar turlari sanaladi。

      Quyidagi sanab o'tilgan operatorlarning har biri bilan yaxshiroq tanishtiradigan bo'lsak: Quyidagi sanab o'tilgan operatorlarning har biri bilan yaxshiroq tanishtiradigan bo'lsak：

  • "+" , "-", "*" operatorlari bizga ma'lum bo'lgan vazifalarni bajarishadi. "+"、"-"、"*" operatorlari bizga ma'lum bo'lgan vazifalarni bajarishadi。

  • "/" operatori siz bilgan berilgan ikkita qiymatni birini ikkinchisiga bo'lish uchun ishlatiladi degan fikr qisman to'g'ri lekin faqat bu emas."/" operatorini nima vazifa bajarishi va C++ da qanday ishlashini masalalar orqali ko'rib o'tamiz. "/"operatori siz bilgan berilgan ikkita qiymatni birini ikkinchisiga bo'lish uchun ishlatiladi degan fikr qisman to'g'ri lekin faqat bu emas."/"operatorini nima vazifa bajarishi va C++ da qanday ishlashini masalalar orqali ko'rib o'tamiz.

    •  #include <iostream> #include <cmath>
using namespace std ; int main (){ int a , b ; float c , d ; cin >> a >> b ; cout << "Natija1:" << a / b << endl ; cin >> c >> d ; cout << "Natija2:" << c / d ; return 0 ; } Console: a = 5 b = 2 Natija1: a / b = 2 c = 5.5 d = 2.2 Natija2: c / d = 2.5

    马萨兰：

     #include <iostream> #include <iomanip> #include <cmath>
using namespace std ; int main () { int a , b , c ; cin >> a ; cin >> b ; cin >> c ; cout << a % b << endl ; cout << b % c << endl ; cout << a % c << endl ; /* Ushbu dastur bir sonni ikkinchi songa bo'lganda qolgan qoldiqni topish uchun zarur bo'lgan koddir. 79 sonini 12ga bo'ladigan bo'lsak butun qismi 6 ga qoldiq qismi esa 7 ga teng bo'ladi ushbu kod esa aynan 7 soni yani qoldiq qismini consolega chiqarish amalini bajarib beradi. */ return 0 ; } Console: a = 125 b = 30 c = 7 a % b = 5 b % c = 2 a % c = 6

    电报

    一旦暂停，jamolmeyliyev 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

    一旦解除暂停，jamolmeyliyev 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦未发表，jamolmeyliyev 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 jamolmeyliyev 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 jamolmeyliyev 的方法：

    举报其他不当行为

    取消标记 jamolmeyliyev 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:

    Jamol Meyliyev

    Posted on Sep 25

    1. Operatorlar nima?

    2. Biz yozgan kodimizga nima uchun kerak?

    3. Nima vazifalarni bajara oladi?

    • Operatorlar bizga C++ dasturlash tilida yoki boshqa bir ixtiyoriy dasturlash tilida ham matematik amallarni amalga oshirganimizda ishlatimiz mumkin. Operatorlarga bazi misollarni keltirib o'tsam, "+" , "-", "*" , "/" , "%" kabi amallar asosiy operatorlar turlari sanaladi.

      Quyidagi sanab o'tilgan operatorlarning har biri bilan yaxshiroq tanishtiradigan bo'lsak:

  • "+" , "-", "*" operatorlari bizga ma'lum bo'lgan vazifalarni bajarishadi.

  • "/" operatori siz bilgan berilgan ikkita qiymatni birini ikkinchisiga bo'lish uchun ishlatiladi degan fikr qisman to'g'ri lekin faqat bu emas."/" operatorini nima vazifa bajarishi va C++ da qanday ishlashini masalalar orqali ko'rib o'tamiz.

    • #include <iostream>
#include <cmath>
using namespace std; int main(){ int a,b;
float c,d;
cin>>a>>b;
cout<<"Natija1:"<<a/b<<endl;
cin>>c>>d;
cout<<"Natija2:"<<c/d; return 0;
} Console:
a=5
b=2
Natija1: a/b=2 c=5.5
d=2.2
Natija2: c/d=2.5

    Yuqoridagi masalada Natija1 xato ishladimi? yoki aslida shunaqa ishlaydimi?

    integer - butun, float

    double = aralash kasr son.

    integer/integer = integer
    integer/float,double = float,double
    float,double/integer= float,double
    float,double/float,double = float,double

    Yuqorida "/" operatorini vazifasi unga nisbatan ishlatilayotgan o'zgaruvchilatning tipiga bog'liq ekanligini bilishimiz mumkin.

    • "%" - operatori nomi qoldiqli bo'lish operatori deb ataladi. Aytishimiz mumkin-ki ushbu operator faqat integer tipidagi o'zgaruvchilari uchun ishlaydi.

    Masalan:

    
#include <iostream>
#include <iomanip>
#include <cmath>
using namespace std;
int main() { int a,b,c;
cin>>a;
cin>>b;
cin>>c;
cout<<a%b<<endl;
cout<<b%c<<endl;
cout<<a%c<<endl;
/* Ushbu dastur bir sonni ikkinchi songa bo'lganda qolgan qoldiqni topish uchun zarur bo'lgan koddir. 79 sonini 12ga bo'ladigan bo'lsak butun qismi 6 ga qoldiq qismi esa 7 ga teng bo'ladi ushbu kod esa aynan 7 soni yani qoldiq qismini consolega chiqarish amalini bajarib beradi. */ return 0; } Console: a = 125
b = 30
c = 7
a % b = 5
b % c = 2
a % c = 6

    Yuqorida qisqacha operatorning bazi turlari haqida ma'lumot berishga harakat qildim. Operatorlarning boshqa turlari haqida yana boshqa maqolada tanishtirib o'tishga harakat qilaman.

    Telegram

    GitHub

    Once suspended, jamolmeyliyev will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

    Once unsuspended, jamolmeyliyev will be able to comment and publish posts again.

    Once unpublished, all posts by jamolmeyliyev will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

    If jamolmeyliyev is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

    Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag jamolmeyliyev:

    jamolmeyliyev consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

    Report other inappropriate conduct

    Unflagging jamolmeyliyev will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.title: 第 5 天代码挑战 | DAY 5 CODE CHALLENGE
item.description:
给出字符串 s= 树以按频率降序重新排列，这样输出将是“eetr”或“eert”。

方法检查字符的频率； 按频率降序写； 输出 = eetr 或输出 = eert

这里 r 和 t 频率相同，因此任何人都可以先写。

程序

  • 我将频率保存在哈希表中。

  • 我按降序对它们（频率）进行了排序。

  • 我根据频率重建了字符串。

结果

原文:

A string s= tree is given to rearrange in decreasing order of frequency such that, the output will be "eetr" or "eert".

APPROACH Check the frequency of the characters; e = 2; t = 1; r = 1; writing this in decreasing order of frequency; output = eetr or output = eert

Here r and t are of the same frequency, therefore anyone can be written first.

PROCEDURE

  • I saved the frequencies in a hashtable.

  • I sorted them (frequencies) in decreasing order.

  • I rebuilt the strings based on frequencies.

item.title: 为什么 firstOrCreate w/ Queue Workers 会导致竞争条件？ | Why is firstOrCreate w/ Queue Workers Causing a Race Condition?
item.description:
韦德·齐默尔曼

发表于今天我意识到我的 Laravel 代码中有一个竞争条件。 我的工作是创建一个新模型然后放入数据库中。 这段代码在同步模式下是完美的，但是一旦我产生了一堆工作线程，我就会得到重复的条目。

我很确定这正在发生，因为工作线程同时连接到数据库。

有没有人能够安全地将记录插入数据库而不会导致不需要的重复条目？

 foreach($games as $game) { ImportGame::dispatch($game, $pokemon) }
 class ImportGame implements ShouldQueue { use Dispatchable, InteractsWithQueue, Queueable, SerializesModels; public function __construct( public string $game, public Pokemon $pokemon, ){} public function handle() { DB::transaction(function () { $game = Game::firstOrCreate([ 'name' => $this->game, ]); $game->pokemon()->save($this->pokemon); }); } }

创建一个帐户，加入数十万 DEV 成员的旅程。

一旦暂停，wadecodez 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，wadecodez 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，wadecodez 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 wadecodez 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 wadecodez 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 wadecodez 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Wade Zimmerman

Posted on Sep 25

Today I realized I had a race condition in my Laravel code. I have a job which creates a new model then puts in in the database. This code is flawless in synchronous mode, but as soon as I spawn a bunch of worker threads, I get duplicate entries.

I am pretty sure this is happening, because the worker threads are connecting to the database at the same time.

Has anyone been able to safely insert records into the database without causing unwanted duplicate entries?

foreach($games as $game) {
    ImportGame::dispatch($game, $pokemon)
}

class ImportGame implements ShouldQueue
{
    use Dispatchable, InteractsWithQueue, Queueable, SerializesModels;

    public function __construct(
        public string $game,
        public Pokemon $pokemon,
    ){}

    public function handle()
    {
        DB::transaction(function () {
            $game = Game::firstOrCreate([
                'name' => $this->game,
            ]);

            $game->pokemon()->save($this->pokemon);
        });
    }
}

item.title: Python 字典 | Python Dictionaries
item.description:
字典是一组无序的key:value对。

字典提供了一种将数据片段相互映射的方法，以便我们可以找到相互关联的值。

假设我们想收集各种糖果棒中的所有卡路里🍫

  • 士力架 215 🍫

  • 里斯的 210 🍫

  • 奇巧 218 🍫

我们可以创建一个名为chocolate的字典来存储这些数据：

 chocolate = { 'Snickers' : 215 , 'Reese' s ': 210, ' KitKat ': 218}

  1. 字典以大括号{ }开头

  2. 每个键都用引号" "包围，每个key:value对用冒号分隔:

在每个逗号之后，尽管它仍然会在没有空格的情况下运行。

我们还可以创建一个空字典：

可以像这样将单个key:value对添加到字典中：

让我们尝试向我们之前创建的empty_dict添加一个 key:value 对。

 empty_dict = {} empty_dict = { 'a' : 'alpha' } print ( empty_dict )

这打印：

可以使用.update()方法将多个key:value对添加到字典中

empty_dict = { 'a' : 'alpha' } empty_dict . update ({ 'b' : 'beta' , 'g' : 'gamma' }) print ( empty_dict )

输出：

 { 'a' : 'alpha' , 'b' : 'beta' , 'g' : 'gamma' }

可以使用以下语法覆盖值： 

 dictonary_name [ 'key' ] = value

让我们回到我们的 empty_dict 示例，将 'a' 的值从 alpha 更改为 ---> apple

 empty_dict = { 'a' : 'alpha' , 'b' : 'beta' , 'g' : 'gamma' } empty_dict [ 'a' ] = apple print ( empty_dict )

输出：

 { 'a' : 'apple ' , 'b' : 'beta' , 'g' : 'gamma' }


贡献代码库或学习如何托管自己的.

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 kster 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 kster 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

A dictionary is an unordered set of key:value pairs.

Dictionaries provide is a way to map pieces of data into eachother so that we can find values that are associated with one another.

Lets say we want to gather all of the calories in various candy bars 🍫

  • Snickers 215 🍫

  • Reese's 210 🍫

  • KitKat 218 🍫

We can create a dictionary called chocolate to store this data:

chocolate = {'Snickers': 215, 'Reese's': 210, 'KitKat': 218}

  1. A dictionary begins with curly brackets { }

  2. Each of the keys are surrounded by quotations " " and each key:value pairs are separated by a colon :

*** It is considered good practice to insert a space after each comma, although it will still run without the spacing.

We can also create an empty dictionary:

A single key:value pair can be added to the dictionary like this:

Let's try adding a single key:value pair to our empty_dict we created before.

empty_dict = {} empty_dict = {'a': 'alpha'} print(empty_dict)

This prints:

Multiple key:value pairs can be added to a dictionary by using the .update() method

empty_dict = {'a':'alpha'}
empty_dict.update({'b':'beta','g':'gamma'})
print(empty_dict)

Output:

{'a':'alpha','b':'beta','g':'gamma'}

Values can be overwritten by using this syntax:

dictonary_name['key'] = value

Let's go back to our empty_dict example and change the value of 'a' from alpha ---> apple

empty_dict = {'a':'alpha','b':'beta','g':'gamma'}
empty_dict['a'] = apple
print(empty_dict)

Output:

{'a': 'apple ', 'b': 'beta', 'g': 'gamma'}

item.title: 媒体管道 | 在 Android 上实现自定义功能 | Mediapipe | Implementing custom feature on Android
item.description:
詹哈维·达达尼亚

发表于项目链接： https ://github.com/google/mediapipe

在 android 上编译并试用已经实现的示例项目

  1. 使用命令docker build . -t mediapipe docker build . -t mediapipe
  2. 在镜像上运行 docker 容器docker run -i -t IMAGE_ID /bin/bash
  3. 在容器内使用命令bash ./setup_android_sdk_and_ndk.sh ~/Android/Sdk ~/Android/Ndk r21设置 Android
  4. 然后使用 bazel 构建 android 二进制文件。 将 project_name（此处为 facedetectioncpu）替换为您要构建的项目的名称。 路径 mediapipe/mediapipe/examples/android/src/java/com/google/mediapipe/apps/ 下的文件夹名称是内置项目的名称。 首次构建此命令需要很长时间。 对于任何后续构建，它将使用缓存的数据并且不会花费很长时间。
  5. 复制 apk 文件sudo docker cp CONTAINER_ID:mediapipe/mediapipe/bazel-bin/mediapipe/examples/android/src/java/com/google/mediapipe/apps /project_name /home/username/downloads/.
  6. 将此apk文件复制到您的Android设备并安装。
  7. 或使用命令adb install project.apk从终端直接安装
  8. 保持电话连接，可以使用adb logcat查看日志

关于媒体管道结构

  1. 顶部的图像具有 mediapipe 项目的一般结构。
  2. 我们在mediapipe/examples/android/src/java/com/google/mediapipe/apps/facemeshgpu上的 BUILD 文件上调用 bazel 构建
  3. 此构建文件指的是/mediapipe/graphs/facemeshgpu/facemeshgpu.pbtxt中存在的图形
  4. 两个文件夹mediapipe/calculators/folder_name/. 和mediapipe/graphs/project_name/. 具有包含有关依赖项信息的 BUILD 文件。

关于图表

  1. 图表可以在这里可视化https://viz.mediapipe.dev/
  2. 从您的任何 .pbtxt 文件中复制粘贴内容，例如https://github.com/google/mediapipe/blob/master/mediapipe/graphs/face_detection/face_detection_full_range_mobile_gpu.pbtxt到可视化器上的编辑器。 它将在左侧显示图表。
  3. 每个盒子都是计算器，有输入和输出。
  4. 此输入输出关系在 .pbtxt 图形文件中指定。

关于计算器

关于计算器中的 open vs process 函数

考虑我们需要在相机预览中显示帧数。 我们从 0 开始（相机开始时的第一帧）并为每个后续帧增加计数。 为此，我们将在计算器的 open 函数中定义变量 count 并为其赋值 0。
我们将在 process 函数中添加增量逻辑count = count + 1并将其显示在框架上。
每帧计数都会增加，因为每个输入（即帧）都会调用处理函数。 修改当前项目

  1. 在计算器文件夹内的 project_folder 中添加新计算器
  2. 在项目计算器文件夹的 BUILD 文件中添加条目
  3. 在图形文件夹中创建项目文件夹并为新项目创建 .pbtxt 图形。
  4. 在项目图文件夹的 BUILD 文件中添加条目
  5. 修改 BUILD mediapipe/examples/android/src/java/com/google/mediapipe/apps/BUILD
  6. 使用命令bazel build PATH TO BUILD编译


一旦暂停，janhavidadhania 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，janhavidadhania 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，janhavidadhania 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 janhavidadhania 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 janhavidadhania 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 janhavidadhania 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Janhavi Dadhania

Posted on Sep 25

project link: https://github.com/google/mediapipe

Compile and try out already implemented example projects on android

  1. build docker image using command docker build . -t mediapipe
  2. run docker container over image docker run -i -t IMAGE_ID /bin/bash
  3. inside the container set up Android using command bash ./setup_android_sdk_and_ndk.sh ~/Android/Sdk ~/Android/Ndk r21
  4. then build android binary using bazel. bazel build -c opt mediapipe/examples/android/src/java/com/google/mediapipe/apps/facedetectioncpu:facedetectioncpu this command is for building facedetectioncpu project. replace project_name (facedetectioncpu here) with the name of the project you want to build. Name of the folders under path mediapipe/mediapipe/examples/android/src/java/com/google/mediapipe/apps/ is name of the inbuild projects. this command would take long for first build. for any subsequent builds, it would use the cached data and shouldn't take long.
  5. apk will be stored at /mediapipe/bazel-bin/mediapipe/examples/android/src/java/com/google/mediapipe/apps /project_name. copy the apk file sudo docker cp CONTAINER_ID:mediapipe/mediapipe/bazel-bin/mediapipe/examples/android/src/java/com/google/mediapipe/apps /project_name /home/username/downloads/.
  6. copy this apk file to your android device and install.
  7. or directly install from terminal using commands adb install project.apk
  8. keep the phone connected and logs could be viewed using adb logcat

about mediapipe structure

  1. Image at the top has general structure of the mediapipe project.
  2. we call bazel build on BUILD file present at mediapipe/examples/android/src/java/com/google/mediapipe/apps/facemeshgpu
  3. This build file refers to graph present at /mediapipe/graphs/facemeshgpu/facemeshgpu.pbtxt
  4. This graph at /mediapipe/graphs/facemeshgpu/facemeshgpu.pbtxt refers to one or more calculators present at 'mediapipe/calculators/folder_name/calculator.cc`
  5. both folders mediapipe/calculators/folder_name/. and mediapipe/graphs/project_name/. has BUILD files that contains information about dependencies.

about graphs

  1. graphs could be visualised here https://viz.mediapipe.dev/
  2. copy paste content from any of your .pbtxt file e.g https://github.com/google/mediapipe/blob/master/mediapipe/graphs/face_detection/face_detection_full_range_mobile_gpu.pbtxt to editor on visualiser. It would show the graph on the left side.
  3. Each box is calculator and has input and output.
  4. This input output relations are specified in .pbtxt graph files.

about calculators

about open vs process function in calculators

consider we need to display frame count on the camera preview. We start with 0 (for the first frame as the camera starts) and increment count for every subsequent frame. For this, we would define variable count in open function of calculator and assign value 0 to it.
We will add increment logic count = count + 1 in process function and display it on frame.
count will be incremented for every frame because process function will be called for each input, i.e frame. Open is called once at the beginning and value 0 will be assigned to count.

Modify current project

  1. add new calculator in project_folder inside calculator folder
  2. add entry in BUILD file of the project calculator folder
  3. create project folder inside graph folder and create .pbtxt graph for new project.
  4. add entry in BUILD file of project graph folder
  5. modify BUILD mediapipe/examples/android/src/java/com/google/mediapipe/apps/BUILD
  6. compile using command bazel build PATH TO BUILD

 
🌚 Dark mode is available in Settings.

item.title: 在线增值税计算器 | VAT Calculator Online
item.description:
发表于这是我用 Python3 制作的增值税计算器。 它能够为所提供的任何数值添加或删除增值税 (20%)。 然后结果会自动复制到剪贴板，以便可以在需要时使用该值。 它被编程为循环，以便它可以根据需要与尽可能多的值一起使用。

增值税计算器

这是我使用的代码。
导入 pyperclip

增值税 = 1.2

返回 x * y

我之所以这样做是因为我使用了一个有效的在线增值税计算器，但我相信我可以通过制作这个简单的工具来加快我的工作流程，并且不想依赖互联网连接来使用它。


一旦暂停，beembuilds 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，beembuilds 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，beembuilds 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 beembuilds 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 beembuild 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记的 beembuilds 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Beembuilds

Posted on Sep 25

This is a VAT calculator that I made in Python3. It has the ability to add or remove VAT (20%) to any numerical value provided. The result then automatically copies to clipboard so that the value can be used where required. It is programmed to loop so that it can be used with as many values as needed.

VAT calculator

This is the code I used.
import pyperclip

vat = 1.2

def remove_vat(x, y): return x / y def add_vat(x , y):

return x * y

while True: print("#### VAT Calculator ####")

num = float(input("Enter Amount: "))

print("Choose Operation:")
print("1. Remove VAT")
print("2. Add VAT")

choice = input("Enter Choice(1/2):")
result = 0

if choice =='1':
    result = remove_vat(num , vat)
elif choice == '2':
    result = add_vat(vat , num)
else:
    print("Invalid Input")

print(round(result , 2))
pyperclip.copy(round(result , 2))

I was inspired to make this because I was using an online VAT calculator which was effective but I believed that I could speed up my workflow by making this simple tool and did not want to rely on an internet connection to be able to use it.

 
🌚 Dark mode is available in Settings.

Once suspended, beembuilds will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, beembuilds will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by beembuilds will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If beembuilds is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
